---
title: "Lab 1"
author: "Nathan Alexander"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: yes
    mode: selfcontained
---

```{r setup}
install.packages("gssr") # general social survey (GSS) data
```

This is an area where you can put in some text.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
```


```{r}
# remotes::install_github("professornaite/critstats", force=TRUE)
library(critstats) # make sure you have loaded the library AFTER the pakcage
```

```{r}

df1 <- critstats::true_size

```


If I want to include my math inline with the text, $ y = mx + b$.


If I would like to write a math equation $$ \dfrac{1}{3} - x^2 $$
